hero.art_prompt: Deepak, a 29 year old Indian man in business-casual, confident, leading a project planning session near a clean board, modern office, organised and aspirational.

panels.narration: Deepak was already good at getting things delivered at work.
panels.dialogue: I always got projects across the line.
panels.img_prompt: Deepak, 29, confidently coordinating a project with his team near a clean planning board, capable and focused, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I lead big projects?
panels.img_prompt: Deepak looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from team lead to leading major projects, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Project Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Deepak's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Project Management, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Deepak enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Deepak confidently starting his first project management lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Project Management
points: Master the real craft: project planning, Agile and Scrum, risk management and delivery frameworks.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Deepak Rao
testimonials.quote: I always delivered. This MBA turned that into real project leadership.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning Agile, Scrum and risk made me ready to lead complex projects.

testimonials.name: Arun Nair
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me grow into project leadership without quitting.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real delivery skills got me a project management role.
